message: The wind made no sound.
Until just now, I had heard the wind blowing.
Why did the wind stop blowing?

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm in the store?"

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But I was on the roof just now."

name: Kimura
message: "Tomosane-kun carried you down here."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-Then where is he now?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san!"

name: Kimura
message: "I don't think I can tell you that."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san!"

name: Kimura
message: "Y-Yeah, uh...
This is a promise between men."

name: Hasaki
message: "A promise between men?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yes, because I could never hold back a man who has set off for battle."

name: Hasaki
message: "To battle? Okay, great. Thanks, see you later!"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Whoa! Why are you running off?"

name: Hasaki
message: "There's only one place where Tomo Nii-san would go to fight!"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Why?"

name: Hasaki
message: "If he's going to fight with Takuji Nii-san, then Kita High is the only place!"

name: Kimura
message: "But do you know where in Kita High?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I won't know until I get there!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Kimura
message: "So... where is he?"

name: Hasaki
message: "What, didn't he tell you?"

name: Kimura
message: "Nope, he didn't tell me a thing."

name: Hasaki
message: "Then he didn't make you swear not to tell! You just didn't know!"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, I guess."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?! Who's that?"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Wh-Where?"
There on the moonlit rooftop...
There was only one silhouette.
There was only one person...
But it looked like he was facing off against some adversary.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"
A statue underneath the moon.
A lone figure.
Something at his chest glittered and gleamed.
The hand held in front of his chest grasped the same knife from before.
It was the same pose as the one from seven years ago.
The only difference was that a single figure stood in the darkness, not two.
The knife's tip was aimed at his own heart.

name: Hasaki
message: "No! You can't!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"
I saw his face in the shadows, and I instantly knew who it was.
There's only one person in the world who could make that expression, a mixture of kindness and irritation.

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-You can't... Tomo Nii-san, you can't do that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why did you follow me?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahahaha... Sorry about that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Damn it, Kimura..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Crap. I forgot to lock the door. If I had locked it, you wouldn't have been able to follow me up here."

name: Hasaki
message: "You can't... Tomo Nii-san, I-I won't let you do that!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "If that's what you were planning to do... I should've just tied you up and never let you leave."

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you, that was also an option."
In that moment, when Tomo Nii-san was worrying about me...
His expression changed for just a split seocnd.
For a split second, his expression changed into... someone else's.
I tried to scream.
But it ended before I could get the scream out of my mouth.
That thing ended...
Like fibers cracking upon steel. Then, blood and flesh...
The sound rang out, lonesome in the dark.
The dirge of the end...
It was a messenger, telling me that this was the end.
Cold iron flashed in the dark.
Bright red blood danced across the blade.
An endless, jet black sky hung over our heads.
The moon tinted our lacquer sky with shades of blue.
The steel flashed.
The red blood flowed.
Everything turned white.
All I could see...
Was white.
Those words I never could say...
Those words I never could hold back...
All those words caught in my throat, and then my breath came out as a scream.

name: Hasaki
message: "NOOOOOO!"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, Tomo Nii-san! NOOOOO!"
I could only scream.
Tears ran down my face as I screamed for him.

name: Tomosane
message: "At the very end, I still messed up, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Pre-established... harmony, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I see. So in your eyes, I've already outlived my purpose."
Tomo Nii-san whispered as if he was talking to himself.
He must have been talking to Takuji Nii-san.
I couldn't tell what had happened to the two of them.
All I knew was that Nii-san had stabbed himself in the chest with a knife.
As a result of that action, no one could be the victor.
If his phyiscal body died...
It would mean the death of three souls.
Why did it have to come to this?
I crumpled and fell on the spot.
My voice caught in my throat.
The tears wouldn't stop.
The trembling wouldn't stop.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, Hasaki... I'm sorry..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It looks like I won't be able to keep my promise. This is the end for me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... I couldn't do anything for you, Hasaki... could I..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's not true... That's not true... Tomo Nii-san, don't go..."

name: Tomosane
message: "There's nothing I can do... I've been beaten..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing I can do... huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Is this too reality?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then I can only accept it..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... If this is how it was going to end, I shouldn't have used the last of my time like this..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I should've spent my time with you..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hahahaha... I've been an awful brother too..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I haven't changed at all..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now then... Farewell, Mamiya Takuji. Congratulations. You've won."

name: Tomosane
message: "And I've lost..."
I ran over to Tomo Nii-san.
I put my arms around him and held him close.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san... Don't go."

name: Tomosane
message: "You dummy... Don't come near me. It's dangerous."

name: Tomosane
message: "This body will be Mamiya Takuji's soon. I'm going to disappear."

name: Hasaki
message: "You can't disappear, Tomo Nii-san! Please!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... I don't really want to disappear."

name: Tomosane
message: "I wanted to be with you longer."

name: Hasaki
message: "Then please, don't go! Let's go home. Let's go home together. Let's just go home..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're right... That was the promise."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, it was..."

name: Tomosane
message: "To be together forever... and talk as much as we wanted..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, you promised we could talk as much as we wanted... I still want to talk to you, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "We didn't talk enough, did we?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Let's... talk."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I-I... Last night, I saw a big sunflower."
The flower I saw on the hill at night.
I saw that sun of the night on a road I never passed by.
In a world ruled by the azure, the sunflowers shone bright with yellow.
I told him about the sunflowers.
The sunflowers on the hill.

name: Hasaki
message: "A big sunflower, yellow and beautiful in the sky..."

name: Tomosane
message: "A sunflower..."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's already summer, you know? It's the middle of the summer..."
I knew that sun in the night.
Because we had seen that same sun together before.

name: Hasaki
message: "Summer break is coming soon. I wish I could've gone somewhere with you this year, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Summer, huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah. You said you wouldn't ever leave me, so I wanted to go on vacation somewhere this summer."

name: Hasaki
message: "Because this summer, it seemed like we were getting along again."

name: Hasaki
message: "This summer break... let's go back to our old town, together."

name: Tomosane
message: "Our town?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's right. Our town. Where you and I were together before."

name: Tomosane
message: "That..."
Tomo Nii-san gently laughed.

name: Tomosane
message: "How did I forgot that? We were there together before."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, so this summer... let's go back."

name: Tomosane
message: "This... summer?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, of course."

name: Tomosane
message: "This... summer?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san, call an ambulance!"

name: Takuji
message: "What?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah!"
Nii-san pushed me away and stood on his own two feet.

name: Takuji
message: "What is this?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Ow, damn..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Nii-san, don't move!"
I tried to stop him, but he slapped away my hand.

name: Hasaki
message: "N-Nii-san..."

name: Kimura
message: "Th-That's..."
His face was different from before.
His voice was different.
He looked precisely the same, and yet it was like he was a completely different person.
As he stood up, there in the moonlight, he looked like a vengeful demon back from the grave.

name: Kimura
message: "Hasaki-chan, be careful!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Nii-san!"

name: Kimura
message: "Don't do it! That's not Tomosane-kun! That's the man who tried to kill you!"

name: Hasaki

name: Kimura

name: Takuji
message: "Now, let's go home, to the ark. The final day is at hand."
He disappeared into the shadow of the building, holding his wound.

name: Kimura
message: "Hasaki-chan!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm sorry!"

name: Kimura
message: "Whoa!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san, I'm really sorry, but..."
I chased after my brother.
I found a small door over where he'd disappeared. There was a steel ladder hanging there.
The ladder led all the way down into the darkness underground.
I was definitely scared, but...
Still, I went.
It was packed full of people down there.
An incredible number of people.
Just how many people could they cram into a place like this?

name: Hasaki
message: "Nii-san..."
I tried to find my brother among the crowd of people.
Just find him...

Someone saw me and then started to talk to me.

name: Kimika

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimika

name: Hasaki

name: Kimika

name: Hasaki

That woman stopped to think hard about something.
She then laughed caustically.

name: Kimika

name: Kimika

name: Kimika

name: Kimika

name: Kimika

name: Hasaki

name: Kimika

I'm just saying that now your brother has to decide whether he wants to be our savior, or your brother."

That was his secret room.
I came here with Kimura-san before.
It was disguised to look like part of the wall. The only reason I saw it before was because the curtains were lifted.

name: Hasaki

Nii-san...
Takuji Nii-san was mumbling something to himself.
My voice didn't even reach him.
Because Takuji Nii-san hated me. Because he thought I should just disappear.
So he couldn't even see me.
I understand.
But...

message: "Huh? This doll is?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, it is, you dumb bitch. Will you ever be saved if you can't even recognize evil when you see it?"

name: Yasuko
message: "W-Wait, please. Uh... S-So you're the Wakatsuki sisters... Whatever, not like I care. Let's get started already."

name: Male Student
message: "H-H-Hurry, hurry up. Faster, faster..."

name: Yasuko
message: "What are they doing?"

name: Kimika
message: "They're going to make her masturbate for them."

name: Yasuko
message: "Huh? They're going to make the doll masturbate?"

name: Kimika
message: "Haa... Here, take some more elixir. You clearly haven't reached enlightenment yet. You need to drink a lot more before you'll understand."

name: Yasuko
message: "O-Okay... Thank you."
The entire crowd was looking at the rabbit doll.
Everyone just stared at the unmoving doll.
What did they see? There were a lot of people getting really worked up and excited.
There were also a lot of other people that didn't understand what was happening.
There were even some people that looked deathly afraid of the doll.
I wonder what those people saw there.

name: Female Student
message: "She's not doing it at all."

name: Yasuko
message: "I-If you don't do it right... all of the men will rape you."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe... You're really good this at this, Yasuko-chan."

name: Yasuko
message: "You masturbate every day, right? Now, think about the most important person in your life and masturbate."

name: Male Student
message: "Ah, ahh... I might achieve victory for a second time... Ah, ahh, victory, here I cum..."

name: Male Student
message: "Right now, my ejaculation leads me to victorrryyy!"

name: Male Student
message: "Ah, I'm right behind you, I'm cumming to victory too! I'm cumming!"

name: Male Student
message: "I'm gonna blow."
They violated...
My doll...
My past self was defiled right before my eyes.
The embodiment of a precious time in my life, when time stopped for one part of my soul... That is what they defiled.
My very memories.
My very self, from a time past.
It was defiled at the hands of strangers.
I was violated.
My memory was desecrated.
My past self was ripped and torn to shreds.

name: Takuji
message: "How's that? How does it feel?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-You're awful... Awful... Why would you do this? You're terrible..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Kagami's totally broken."

name: Hasaki
message: "Why? Why would you do that? She's my... my precious, precious..."

name: Takuji
message: "Your precious sister is broken. She's utterly broken."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Ah? Huh? Hawha, whahahawha?"

name: Hasaki
message: "N-Nii-san?"
His eyes suddenly rolled back, and then his face started convulsing.

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um!"

name: Takuji
message: "I-I'll break you. I'll totally break you... I'll break you, once and for all."

name: Takuji
message: "M-M-Making a fool... Making a fool of me..."

name: Takuji
message: "Someone get a hammer! Someone get a ladder! Get the stakes! It's a crucifixion... I'll crucify you. I'll crucify you, crucify you, crucify you, crucify you, crucify you, crucify you, crucify you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Wh-Why? Why?"

name: Takuji
message: "Shut up! I can't let her go after she challenged me like that! This time I'll really break this fucking rabbit!"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, stop!"

name: Takuji
message: "That concrete pillar... Crucify her on that pillar. High up. Much higher than here... Crucify her. Crucify that bitch. Crucify her, crucify her, crucify her."
The boisterous atmosphere in the room disappeared as people ceased to talk, one by one.
One by one, they realized...
And soon, the entire ark was silent.
There was no one with me.
In that enormous underground space, I could only cry.
It was all I could do. I just cried.
"Tsukasa..."
There was a person there, someone who called me... Tsukasa.
But I didn't want to meet anyone who would call me that.
"This is... This is Kagami, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, that's... That's not her name."
"How did this happen? Why?"

name: Hasaki
message: "What do you mean, why? You did it, of course."
"This is awful... Who could do such a thing?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Nii-san..."
I looked at my brother.
His face was Tomo Nii-san's.
But that wasn't Tomo Nii-san's soul in there.
That person was not the person I most wanted to see.
"That's right..."
"Kagami... Let's go home."
Nii-san carried the doll in his arms.
"Let's go... home."
The two of us walked through the city streets at night.
It was too late to catch a train.
It would take us at least an hour to walk all the way home.
The two of us just walked in silence.
Then...
"Back then, I carried you home on my back like this, didn't I?"
"That time, you tried too hard, and sprained your ankle running."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's..."
"I came right away when I heard about it from Tsukasa."
"And then, this is what you said."

name: Hasaki
message: "That was me..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That story about the hill..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That hill, where the two of us found the sunflowers."

name: Hasaki
message: "I told you that I would climb that hill and go find Dad's soul somewhere out there."

name: Hasaki
message: "I thought I could go out beyond that hill and find Dad's soul, so that he could come back to us."
"How would you do that?"
"Where were you going to go looking, anyway?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't know."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's just... there was a big hill with sunflowers, and we could never go past it."

name: Hasaki
message: "The road of sunflowers, where the sunflowers stretch their stalks out to heaven above. I thought that I could climb that hill and go beyond it, to the place where Dad's soul was laid to rest."
"A big hill?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, the big hill in Dad's hometown."
"Was it really that big?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Not now it isn't, but back then, when I was a child, it seemed so big."

name: Hasaki
message: "I thought it was the wall at the end of the world."

name: Hasaki
message: "I thought if I could just get to the top of that hill, it would be the limit of the world."

name: Hasaki
message: "But I was wrong."

name: Hasaki
message: "When I got to the top..."

name: Hasaki
message: "There was more of the city, just like here."

name: Hasaki
message: "There was a hill after that, and another after that one too."

name: Hasaki
message: "The city continued on forever."

name: Hasaki
message: "That was when I realized the world has no end."
"Wasn't that when you started crying?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah."

name: Hasaki
message: "Because that's when I knew Dad's soul wasn't coming back, so I got sad."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's when I learned that there are things in this world which will never come back."

name: Hasaki
message: "And then you came, Tomo Nii-san. That's how it always was."

name: Hasaki
message: "You always came for me when I was crying."

name: Hasaki
message: "Because I'm always crying... Because I can't do anything..."

name: Hasaki
message: "So I wanted to become stronger... I tried to be stronger."
"I know you did. But maybe you tried too hard."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm no good, huh? I couldn't do anything."
"That's not true. I'm still amazed at how hard you tried."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san..."
He couldn't see me.
Some other person's soul was in his body. He couldn't see me.
But no one except Tomo Nii-san could say the things he was saying.
Even if he couldn't see me anymore, this person was still my brother after all.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san."
I quietly hugged his back.
Then he stopped walking.
"Kagami, we're home."
He suddenly stopped in front of a house I didn't recognize.
"Your parents are probably going to be really sad when they see what happened to you."
"But you said you wanted to go home, right?"
"Kagami..."

name: Old Lady
message: "Yes?"

name: Old Lady
message: "E-Excuse me?"
"Please forgive me... I... I couldn't protect Kagami."
"I let them do this to her!"
"I'm so sorry!"

name: Old Lady
message: "Who are you?"
"Huh?"

name: Old Lady
message: "Is something wrong with your doll?"
"Huh?"
"What's happening?"

name: Old Lady
message: "Um... What are you talking about?"
"No, that's not it. This was Kagami just a second ago. Wakatsuki Kagami-san."

name: Old Lady
message: "Is that the doll's name?"
"No, that's not it. Kagami lives here, right? She's your daughter."

name: Old Lady
message: "Um, it's getting pretty late. If you don't mind, I'd really rather not keep talking like this."
"But, Mrs. Wakatsuki!"

name: Old Lady
message: "Um... We're the Hasegawa family, not Wakatsuki."
"Huh?"

name: Old Lady
message: "Um... If you don't leave, I'm going to have to call the police."
"What's this? What's happening? I don't..."
"Tsukasa!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Are you satisfied yet?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Jeez! I don't even know who you are anymore! Give me back my Tomo Nii-san!"
"Eek!"
"AAAAAAAHHHHH!"
